achievements.title: A Wise Guy EH? Get 'Em Outta Here!
achievements.description: On the mission - Capelli Family: Witness Protection, capture the first enemy vessel you hijack without using the Justice Shot or losing any health

achievements.description: On the mission - Capelli Family: Legal Eagle after the helicopter scene, get to the mansion without ever friendly firing or running into civilian vehicles
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Wreaking Havoc on the Interstate
achievements.description: Complete the mission - Warlords: Toxic Convoy after destroying at least 15 civilian vehicles with the warlord vehicles and with the Detonator cheat active
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Semper Fi
achievements.description: On the mission - Warlords: Hardware Hijack, get to the canal base without ever running into a civilian vehicle (Speed cheat allowed)
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Pathetic Bunch of Army Pukes
achievements.description: On the mission - Warlords: Hardware Hijack, arrest all of the Warlords at the canal (Speed cheat allowed)
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Freeze ~ You Rebel Scum!
achievements.description: Complete the mission - Warlords: Atomic Ambush without using your Justice Bar and with the Laser Law cheat active
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: At the Heart of the Kill Zone
achievements.description: Complete the mission - Warlords: Velocity with the Detonator cheat active
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Grandma's Kisses
achievements.description: On the mission - Convicts: Ski Run Rampage, save all 3 civilians without friendly firing or hijacking a convict
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Raving Riffraff in the Rapids
achievements.description: Complete the mission - Convicts: Rapid Reaction with the Wild Waters cheat active
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Silly Billy With the Molotovs
achievements.description: Complete the mission - Convicts: Wilde's Boys without losing any Helicopter health
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Bro Stop Goofin' Around, I've Got TNT on This Thang!
achievements.description: Complete the mission - Convicts: The Forger with the Detonator cheat active
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Ol' Buddy, Ol' Pal
achievements.description: On the mission - Convicts: A Snitch in Time, eliminate the 3 convict vehicles while in the assisting police car then get to the checkpoint (Brute cheat allowed)
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Police Days
achievements.description: On the mission - Vixens: Daylight Archaeology, don't let any of the Snowstorm Police Units get lower than 42% health
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Joyride of Their Lives
achievements.description: On the mission - Vixens: Fox Hunt, have at least 5 Vixens get on top of the Semi-Truck without losing player health and then switch vehicles
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Way To Go, Daddy-O
achievements.description: Complete the mission - Vixens: Fox Hunt with the Reoffender cheat active
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Isekai'd to Another Realm
achievements.description: Complete the mission - Vixens: Babes Boats and Bullets after annihilating at least 8 civilian vehicles with the Semi-Truck and with the Detonator cheat active
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: The USA, Where Bigger Is Better
achievements.description: Complete the mission - Vixens: Girl's Best Friend with the Big Wheels and the Detonator cheats active
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Lean Mean Gatling Machine
achievements.description: On the mission - Killer 66: Guardian, eliminate the 9 enemy vehicles during the helicopter section without losing any helicopter health and without friendly firing
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: This Is Why She Calls Me Ace
achievements.description: On the mission - Killer 66: Guardian, shoot down at least 6 Killer 66 with the helicopter before landing
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Ol' Reliable
achievements.description: On the mission - Killer 66: The Big Game, get to the helicopter scene without ever switching from the Enforcer firearm (If you ever do you have to restart the mission from the beginning)
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Gas Gas Gas!
achievements.description: Complete the mission - Killer 66: Synthetic Science after getting hit by the drug at least 6 times
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Stone Cold Killers
achievements.description: On the mission - Killer 66: Risky Business, have at least 6 Killer 66 Members die without shooting at all and with the Invincibility cheat active
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Crazy Taxi
achievements.description: Beat any top preset time trial at Interstate 77 with the Jord 450i TX with the Detonator cheat active
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Badlands Ricer Family Car
achievements.description: Beat any top 3 preset time trial at Capital City with the "The Claw" after devouring at least 40 vehicles with the Law Lord and Detonator cheats active
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: The Thrill of Catching a Biggun
achievements.description: Beat either top preset time trial at Snowstorm Peaks with the Xenturia Outboard 400 without losing any vessel health
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Extreme Sports Under the Influence, Officer?
achievements.description: Beat any top 3 preset time trial at Vulture Canyon with the SecMoto ERX450 with the Mirror Mode and the Poisoned cheats active (Can change color)
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: The Off Day
achievements.description: Beat any top preset time trial at Sunset Falls with the Magnello M40 without going below 90% vehicle health
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Organized Splatter: That's Why I Love ~ Nestle Crunch! ~
achievements.description: On the mission - Killer 66: Pursuit Plunder after getting back the pursuit vehicle, shake off 3 hijackers without taking out your weapon
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Bumper Spree: Is This Your First Rodeo?
achievements.description: Get a Brute Force x5 while driving a Civilian's Vehicle
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Friendly Frenzy: Turn in Your Badge?
achievements.description: Complete a mission after getting at least 5 Civilian Casualty pop ups without loading any checkpoints (Double Damage cheat is allowed)
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Double Kill: Viewtiful Justice
achievements.description: Get a Fatality x2 during a Justice Shot before landing
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Triple Kill: You Will Fear the Nail-Hammer!
achievements.description: Get a Fatality x3 while using the Nail-Hammer
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Overkill: A Spartan Without Armor
achievements.description: Get a Fatality x4 while hijacking
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Killamanjaro: One Versus All
achievements.description: Get a Fatality x7 with the Iron Man cheat active
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Capiche, Forget About It
achievements.description: Complete the mission - Capelli Family: Don the Run without using your Justice Bar to restore health and with the Iron Man cheat active
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Crashing the General's Pity Party
achievements.description: Complete the mission - Warlords: General's Revenge without using your Justice Bar to restore health and with the Wild Water and Iron Man cheats active
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Served His Final Meal on a Platter
achievements.description: Complete the mission - Convicts: Bus to the Border without using your Justice Bar to restore health and with the Reoffender, Detonator and Poisoned cheats active
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Gonna Have to Whip Me Harder!
achievements.description: Complete the mission - Vixens: Whiplash without using your Justice Bar to restore health and with the Reoffender, Detonator and Mirror Mode cheats active
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga

achievements.title: Through the Fire and the Flames
achievements.description: Complete the mission - Killer 66: Monster Toshima without using your Justice Bar to restore health and with the Reoffender, Detonator and Iron Man cheats active
achievements.author: Aaamdacuaga
